title: EBSCO Education Webinars
content:
EBSCO Education Webinars

Dear Students,

Details about the trainings shared by our Üsküdar University Library and Documentation Department are presented below. Information on the selection of academic research resources that researchers need to write their theses, articles and projects, access to these resources and the use of efficient working tools will be shared. Registration is required to attend the trainings.

Digital Library for Researchers: TÜBİTAK ULAKBIM Resources

Date : Thursday, May 22, 2025 | 10:00-11:00 |

Registration

Free Open Access Publishing with “Read and Publish”

Date : Thursday, May 22, 2025 | 11:30 - 12:30 |

Registration

Regards.
